hero.bio: A decade of keeping workplaces safe and organizations compliant. I'm no Bruce Wayne, but I do wear a different mask at night.

skills.title: I complement field experience with digital production
skills.description: What I learned across audits, operations, certification, and hands-on delivery now shapes the tools I use and the way I work.

services.title: What I Do
services.description: From audits and safety systems to fast Astro-powered websites, I help organizations solve both operational and digital problems.

items.title: ISO 9001 Auditing
items.text: Internal and external audit support, gap analysis, and documentation review for quality management systems.

items.title: OHS / ISO 45001 Consultancy
items.text: Occupational health and safety risk assessments, legal compliance checks, and workplace safety system setup.

items.title: Web Development
items.text: Fast, lightweight personal and corporate websites built with Astro.js and hosted on Cloudflare.

items.title: Digital Automation
items.text: Custom automation solutions using Google Apps Script, Excel VBA, and Python.

portfolio.title: Websites I designed for different industries
portfolio.description: From elevators and chemicals to food and technology, this section showcases corporate websites I built through a logo-first presentation.

items.title: Liftron Elevator
items.description: Corporate website design and content structure.

items.title: Dezenkon Chemical
items.description: Corporate site direction aligned with the brand identity.

items.title: Lidya Technology
items.description: Service-focused digital presence with a clear corporate narrative.

items.title: Ozbil Flour
items.description: Simple and trustworthy promotional website tailored to the sector.

testimonials.title: What They Say

items.name: Cihat Bulut
items.details: Serdar combines field discipline with practical systems thinking. He keeps audit work structured, calm, and solution-oriented.

items.name: Ömer Özgür Gök
items.details: What stands out about Serdar is reliability. Whether the work is operational or digital, he builds trust quickly and delivers clearly.
